description: Address semantic review issues: fix shallow-copy DEFAULT_CONFIG mutation, refactor MCP tool test to avoid format duplication, add negative-path test for run_backtest
steps: Fix shallow-copy in load_watchlist() by using _deep_merge(DEFAULT_CONFIG, {}) instead of DEFAULT_CONFIG.copy()
Refactor test_augur_debate_mcp_tool to verify data structures instead of reconstructing output format
acceptance_criteria: load_watchlist() returns a fully independent copy when no file exists
MCP tool test verifies data validity without duplicating output formatting
Empty-data backtest test verifies early-return path
All tests pass: python -m pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short
